raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es paglabbaſchu ſcho
Pilsfahtu / ka es to iſpeſtiju
mannis deht/ un manna Kalpa
Dahwida deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tai paſcha Nakti taſ
notiffahs/ ka ta KUNGA En-
gelis iſgahje/ un kawe eekſch to
Affirenu Lehgera tints aſtondef-
mits un peez tuhſtoſchus / un
kad tee Rihtaagri zehlahs/ reds/
tad bija tur wiſs Mirronu pilns.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta aſgahje Saneribs
tas Kehnirſch no Affirijas / un
gahje nohſt / un greeſahs atpak-
tat/ un palike eekſch Miniwes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad wiſsch Nisroka
fawa Deewa Namnâ peelnh-
dſe/ tad nekawe to Adrameleks
un SatEzers winna Dehti ar
Sohbinu/ un tee aisbehdſe us to
Gemmai Ararat. Un winna
Dehls Affaraddons tappe par
Kehniru winna Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XX. Nodalla.
Iſkijs tohp us paſchu Mirſchanu neweffels: 1.
Peeluhds Deewu : 2. Dabbu no ta paſcha
jawas Oſhwibas Pagarrinaſchanu : 4/ 5.
Las tohp winnam finnams darrihts zaur
weenu Brihauma-Sihni : 9. Rahda teem
Babilonercu Iſſnhtiteem wiſu ſawu Man-
tu : 12/ 13. Kaſ winnam par Grehkeem
ftua/ un taveh; fohti no ta Praweeta Eſai-
jus aprahts tohp : 17. Mirſi : 21.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Anni Laikâ tappe If-
tijus us paſchu Mirſcha-
nu neweffels / un tas
Praweets Eſaijus Ameza Dehls
nahze pre ta / un faſzija us to :
Ta fatka tas KUNG S: Ap-
fohp tawn Nammu/ jo tu no-
mitſi/ un ne dſhwefi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad greese Iſkijs fam
Watgu prett Seenu / un pe
luhdſe to KUNGII/ un faſzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak KUNGS ! peemiun
luhdsams/ ka es tawa Breeſſch
eekſch Pateefibas ar pilnigu St
di ſtaigajs / un kaſ tew patil
padarrijs. Un Iſkijs rauda-
gauchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Eſaijus wehl
bija puſs Zeltu zaar Pilsfaht
iſgahjts/ tad ktua ta KUNG
Wahrds us winzu/ un faſzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eij atpakkat/ un fatki ul
Iſkiju mannu Laſchnu Waldit
ju: Ta fatka tas KUNG S
tawa Tehwa Dahwida Deew
Es eſmu tawu Luhgſchann kla
fijs / es eſmu tawas Affaras
dſejs/ rangi / es darriſchu te
weſſelu/ treschâ Deena eefi tu
augſchu ta KUNGA Namnâ
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es pee tawahin Da
nahm wehl peeliſchu peezpade
mits Gaddus/ un iſpeſtijchu te
arridjan / un fcho Pilsfahtu
ta Kehnirra no Affirijas Ro
kas/ un vafargaſchu fcho Pil
fahtu ſewts pehz / un mani
Kalpa Dahwida pehz.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz faſzija Eſaijue
Remuneet weenu Wihgês-Pih
Un tee rehme to/ un likte to
to Trummu / un wiſch ku
weffels.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Iſkijs faſzija us Eſa
ju: Kurra irr ta Sihne/ka man
tas KUNGS weffelu darrihs
in ka es treschâ Deena ta KU
GA Namnâ eeſchu?
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
